uiBuilder.label: Product Selector
uiBuilder.description: A single-select (radio) group of product cards: each option has a title, optional subtitle + checkmark bullets, and a pill. Composes now-card + now-highlighted-value + now-icon.

properties.name: options
properties.label: Options
properties.description: Array of product options. Each: { id, sys_id, title, subtitle, bullets:[string], pill, pillTone: info|neutral|positive|warning|error, pillIcon }.

properties.name: value
properties.label: Selected option id
properties.description: The id of the currently selected option. Leave empty to select the first option by default.

properties.name: bulletsWhenSelectedOnly
properties.label: Show details only when selected
properties.description: When on, the subtitle and bullet points show only for the selected card.

actions.name: PRODUCT_SELECTED
actions.label: Product selected
actions.description: Fired when the user selects an option. Payload is the entire selected option: { value, id, sys_id, title, subtitle, pill, pillTone, pillIcon, bullets }.

payload.name: value
payload.label: Selected option id
payload.description: The id of the option the user selected (back-compat alias of id).

payload.name: sys_id
payload.label: Sys id
payload.description: ServiceNow record sys_id of the selected product, when sourced from a table.

payload.name: pillTone
payload.label: Pill tone
payload.description: The pill tone: info | neutral | positive | warning | error.

payload.name: pillIcon
payload.label: Pill icon
payload.description: The now-icon glyph shown inside the pill, if any.

payload.name: bullets
payload.label: Bullets
payload.description: Array of the selected product's bullet strings.
